context: Tests whether the response provides practical CI pipeline optimization strategies.

checklist.name: Suggests parallelizing independent steps
checklist.description: Recommends running lint, unit tests, and build in parallel since they're independent

checklist.name: Recommends dependency caching
checklist.description: Suggests caching node_modules or the npm/yarn cache to skip repeated installs

checklist.name: Proposes test splitting or sharding
checklist.description: Suggests splitting test suites across parallel runners/matrices to reduce the longest step

checklist.name: Mentions conditional or incremental steps
checklist.description: Suggests skipping steps when unchanged (e.g., skip lint if no source changes, skip deploy on non-main branches)

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: GitHub Actions syntax references and CI concepts are correct
